```{r}
library(broom)
model = lm(kcal ~ protein_intake, data=data)
model_int = model[[1]][[1]]
model_slope = model[[1]][[2]]
r2 = glance(model)[[1]][[1]]

data |>
  ggplot(aes(x=protein_intake, y=kcal)) +
    geom_point(color="darkblue", size=0.5) +
    geom_abline(slope = model_slope, intercept = model_int, color="red")
```
